items.title: Critério para vice de Flávio Bolsonaro
'Mancha fria' no Atlântico intriga especialistas sobre clima
items.summary: Área no Atlântico Norte desafia tendência global, esfriando há 150 anos, enquanto o resto do planeta aquece. Novo estudo fornece possível explicação para o fenômeno. Ao sudeste da Groenlândia, no meio do Atlântico Norte, existe uma anomalia que há décadas intriga os cientistas.

items.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed on Sunday as Tehran casts doubt on timing
items.summary: The US president's comments come as Iran says an exact date has not been decided, but it "will not be tomorrow".

items.title: Emma Raducanu storms into the Queen’s final after two wins in one day and injury drama
Derry’s All-Ireland SFC dream ends in a chaotic thriller against Meath, with black cards, big scores and late drama
Riots and racism: why is the UK burning?
items.summary: Claims of two-tier policing and uncontrolled immigration may not be borne out by the facts, but that has not stopped them being played up for political endsAs the people of Glengormley, on the northern edge of Belfast, tidied up and prepared for more violence in the midst of what has been described as a modern-day pogrom, a court 500 miles away in Southampton, on the south coast of England, started to deal with its own outbreak of thuggery.The trigger for this week’s riots in the Northern Irish capital had been the image of a black assailant who appeared to be stabbing and slashing his supine white victim in the face and neck while shouting in Arabic. The suspect was later revealed to be a refugee from Sudan. Continue reading...

items.title: The moment I knew: When he saw my unkempt hovel, he was so nonjudgmental
items.summary: Brendan Maclean had never spoken with drag queen Karen from Finance in person, nor laid eyes on the man behind the makeup. Then came a chance encounter in MelbourneFind more stories from the moment I knew seriesI’d had a big, sparkly pop career in my 20s but by 2024 I was beyond my twink era, and getting by hopping from one weird gig to the next. Paul, who I call my gay uncle, and Daniel Johns of Silverchair fame, had made just one LP together, and the obscure track, Thinking in Reverse, was one of my favourites.

items.title: Momfluencers are co-parenting with AI. Is it better than a man? | Arwa Mahdawi
items.summary: This public service announcement is brought to you by the New York Times which, in an offering to the Ragebait Gods, published an op-ed with that headline on the eve of Pride month. “There has still never been a better time in human history to happily and successfully pursue heterosexuality.”A sincere congratulations to Ms Taylor for her successful pursuit of heterosexuality, and her brave dismantling of straw men. Namely, I keep seeing data which somewhat contradicts the idea that we live in a golden age for straight women.Arwa Mahdawi is a Guardian columnist Continue reading...
